title: Regression Suite Manifest
description: Governed manifest declaring a set of replayable traces to be executed as a batch regression suite. Used by the BR Replay Regression Harness.

suite_id.description: Unique identifier for this regression suite.

suite_name.description: Human-readable name for this regression suite.

version.description: Semantic version of the suite manifest.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this suite manifest was created.

traces.description: Ordered list of trace entries to include in this regression suite.

trace_id.description: Identifier of the persisted trace to replay.

expected_decision_status.description: The decision consistency status expected from the replay analysis (e.g. consistent).

minimum_reproducibility_score.description: Minimum acceptable reproducibility score in [0, 1]. Replay results below this threshold cause the trace to fail.

tags.description: Categorical labels for grouping and filtering traces.

description.description: Human-readable description of the suite purpose and scope.
